/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m0plus -mthumb -mfloat-abi=soft -g -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--build-id=none -nostartfiles -Wl,--script=/home/alexander/Programming/rp2xxx/pico-sdk/src/rp2040/boot_stage2/boot_stage2.ld -Wl,-Map=/home/alexander/Programming/rp2xxx/rp2040_touch_lcd/build/pico-sdk/src/rp2040/boot_stage2/bs2_default.elf.map CMakeFiles/bs2_default.dir/compile_time_choice.S.o -o bs2_default.elf
